The '''Nitrocellulose Incendiary Device 0033X''', more commonly known as the '''0033X grenade''', was a combat explosive produced by [[Greff-Timms Industrial/Legends|Greff-Timms Industrial]]. The 0033X was the standard-issue [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic's]] [[Rocket-Jumper Elite Advance Unit|rocket jumpers]]. It was the size of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] fist and could be set to either explode instantaneously or on a ten-[[Standard second|second]] delay. While some examples survived into the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], whether they were still capable of working or not could depend greatly on their condition.
